name: Tableau-to-Fabric Deployment
description: Deploy all Tableau-to-Fabric migration artifacts (Lakehouse, Notebook, Dataflow, Semantic Model, Report, Pipeline) to a Fabric workspace in dependency order with folder organization.

tasks.name: Authenticate to Azure
tasks.description: Verify Azure context via Get-AzContext. If not connected, prompt to run Connect-AzAccount for Fabric REST API access.

tasks.name: Discover Artifacts
tasks.description: Scan ProjectDir for artifact directories (.Lakehouse, .Notebook, .Dataflow, .SemanticModel, .Report, .Pipeline) and report counts.

tasks.name: Deploy Lakehouse
tasks.description: Create schema-enabled Lakehouse (optional enableSchemas flag) via POST /workspaces/{id}/items. Wait for SQL analytics endpoint provisioning (up to 180s).

tasks.name: Deploy Notebooks
tasks.description: Create Notebook items and upload .ipynb definitions with Lakehouse binding (trident metadata injection). Auto-converts VSCode.Cell format to standard .ipynb JSON.

tasks.name: Deploy Dataflows
tasks.description: Create DataflowGen2 items and upload mashup.pq + auto-generated queryMetadata.json via dedicated /dataflows/{id}/updateDefinition endpoint.

tasks.name: Deploy Semantic Model
tasks.description: Deploy Semantic Model from TMDL definition files. Substitute SQL endpoint and lakehouse name placeholders. Auto-generate definition.pbism manifest. Skip cultures/ subdirectory.

tasks.name: Deploy Report
tasks.description: Deploy Power BI Report from PBIR definition. Rewrite definition.pbir from byPath to byConnection referencing deployed Semantic Model ID.

tasks.name: Deploy Pipeline
tasks.description: Create Data Pipeline and upload pipeline-content.json via dedicated /dataPipelines/{id}/updateDefinition endpoint. References deployed Notebook and Dataflow items.

tasks.name: Organize Folders
tasks.description: Create 5 workspace folders (01-Data Storage, 02-Data Ingestion, 03-Data Transformation, 04-Orchestration, 05-Analytics) and move deployed items into them.

tasks.name: Run Notebooks (optional)
tasks.description: Execute deployed Spark notebooks via POST /items/{id}/jobs/instances?jobType=RunNotebook. Triggered by -RunNotebooks flag.

tasks.name: Run Pipeline (optional)
tasks.description: Trigger orchestration pipeline via POST /items/{id}/jobs/instances?jobType=Pipeline. Triggered by -RunPipeline flag. 30-minute timeout.
